reference: I am waiting for the results of a biopsy. I have leukoplakia on the roof of my mouth, specifically on the upper back right side. There was also a small open area next to it. Neither the dentist nor the oral surgeon could find an obvious cause; I have had it for six months. What are the statistics on malignancy with the ulcerated area next to the white patch? I am fifty-four years old and female. I quit smoking ten years ago.
